name: I got sick from chemicals at work in Salt Lake City but didn't tell my boss right away, can I still file a workers comp claim?
description: Yes in Utah if no prejudice to employer; report ASAP with medical proof.[2][3]

mainEntity.name: I got sick from chemicals at work in Salt Lake City but didn't tell my boss right away, can I still file a workers comp claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes in Utah if no prejudice to employer; report ASAP with medical proof.[2][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, you can still file if your employer wasn't prejudiced by the delay, but late reporting risks denial.[1][2][3] Utah law requires notice within 180 days for occupational illnesses, but courts consider if delay harmed investigation.[3] Key factors: Document symptoms timeline, get medical reports linking illness to work, explain delay reason. See a workers comp attorney immediately to assess prejudice and file formally. Time is critical to protect benefits.
